sourceSummary.oneLine: Harness wiring information for a D-SUB25_MALE connector using 10126-3000PE (3M), including signal names, cable colors, molding, soldering, and heat-shrink work notes.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as DHF electrical harness design reference for connector pin assignments, signal labels, cable color pairs, and assembly notes.
keyPoints: Signals shown include TRXP0-TRXP3, TRXN0-TRXN3, OUT_EXP_REQ, OUT_EXP_REQ_N, OUT_EXP_ACK, OUT_EXP_ACK_P, VCC, GND, and NC.
Cable color pair notation is provided for multiple signals, including Red (Yellow), Yellow (Red), Green (Pink), Pink (Green), White (Gray), Gray (White), and others.
Assembly notes state 납땜 후 Molding 작업 and 납땜 후 수축튜브 작업.

concepts.name: D-SUB25 male connector harness pinout
concepts.evidence: D-SUB25_MALE ... TRXP3 ... TRXP2 ... TRXP1 ... TRXP0 ... OUT_EXP_REQ_N ... OUT_EXP_REQ ... GND ... VCC

evidence.claim: The harness uses or references a 10126-3000PE (3M) D-SUB25_MALE connector.
The document lists differential-style TRXP and TRXN signals for channels 0 through 3.
evidence.evidenceText: TRXP3 ... TRXP2 ... TRXP1 ... TRXP0 ... TRXN3 ... TRXN2 ... TRXN1 ... TRXN0

evidence.claim: The document lists OUT_EXP_REQ, OUT_EXP_REQ_N, OUT_EXP_ACK, and OUT_EXP_ACK_P signals with cable color pair annotations.
evidence.evidenceText: OUT_EXP_REQ_N Yellow (Red) ... OUT_EXP_REQ Red (Yellow) ... OUT_EXP_ACK Green (Pink) ... OUT_EXP_ACK_P Pink (Green)
evidence.pageTarget: OUT EXP Request Acknowledge Harness Signals

evidence.claim: The harness includes VCC, GND, and NC pin designations.
evidence.evidenceText: NC ... GND ... VCC ... GND ... NC ... VCC

evidence.claim: Cable colors are documented using a color and pair color format.
Assembly notes call for molding work after soldering.
Assembly notes call for heat-shrink tube work after soldering.
